attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CQAR.OBJECT_ID, 
CQAR.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, 
CQAR.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, 
CQAR.APPROVAL_SCOPE, 
CQAR.PRECEDENCE, 
CQAR.APPR_QUEUE_SEQ, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.APPR_CEC_ID, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') APPR_CEC_ID, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.APPR_ROLE, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') APPR_ROLE, 
CQAR.APPR_TEAM_ID, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.APPR_TEAM_NAME, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') APPR_TEAM_NAME, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.DEFAULT_TEAM_MEMBER, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') DEFAULT_TEAM_MEMBER, 
CQAR.DECISION, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.BH_REWARD_CODE, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') BH_REWARD_CODE, 
CQAR.CAN_MODIFY_DISCOUNT, 
CQAR.IS_DYNAMICALLY_ADDED, 
CQAR.CAN_ADD_APPROVER, 
CQAR.READ_ONLY_FLAG, 
CQAR.DECISION_SLA, 
CQAR.REMINDER1_SLA, 
CQAR.REMINDER2_SLA, 
CQAR.ESC_SLA, 
CQAR.ESC_TYPE, 
CQAR.ESC_ACTION_TYPE, 
CQAR.ESC_LEVEL, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_1, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_1, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_2, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_2, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_3, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_3, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_NAME, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_NAME, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_NAME, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_NAME, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_NAME, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_NAME, 
CQAR.IS_CURRENT_APPROVER, 
CQAR.DECISION_SOURCE, 
CQAR.DECISION_DATE, 
CQAR.DECISION_PENDING_FROM_TS, 
COALESCE(CQAR.CREATED_ON, CURRENT_DATE) as CREATED_ON,
COALESCE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.CREATED_BY, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),'CCW') as CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(CQAR.UPDATED_ON,CURRENT_DATE) as  UPDATED_ON,
COALESCE(CQAR.UPDATED_BY, 'CCW') as UPDATED_BY,
CQAR.NEXT_SLA_NOTIFN, 
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS,
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS,
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CQAR.ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS, CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS,
COALESCE(CAST (CQAR.IS_IMPLICIT_APPR as VARCHAR(1)),'N') as IS_IMPLICIT_APPR,
CQAR.DECISION_ID,
CQAR.PRECEDENCE_ID,
CQAR.APPROVAL_SCOPE_ID
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_APPROVAL_ROUTE_KAFKA CQAR
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CQAR.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,CQAR.OBJECT_ID ORDER BY  CQAR.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC,CQAR.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER DESC)=1        /* ADDED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL Added New Attribute EDW_CREATE_DTM  In The ORDER BY Clause*/
Where CQAR.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_CQ_APPROVAL_ROUTE_KAFKA')
